meta.status: Full Design System Rules — Hierarchy, Naming, States, Typography

scanOptions.errorMessage: Please select a category to scan (e.g., Components).

suggestion.message: Component set is missing a description. This is vital for DS documentation.
Description is too vague. High-quality descriptions should follow the Purpose/Usage/Avoid pattern.
This variant needs a specific description explaining its unique properties.
Consider adding a link to ZeroHeight or Storybook for better handoff.
Component set has multiple variants without individual descriptions. Each variant (Size, State, Type) should describe its unique behavior.

purpose.button: to trigger immediate actions and form submissions
purpose.input: to capture user text input with validation
purpose.card: to group related content in a contained surface
purpose.modal: to focus attention on critical decisions or forms
purpose.tooltip: to provide contextual help without cluttering the interface
purpose.default: to provide clear visual context and functionality

usage_scenario.primary: it's the main call-to-action on the screen
usage_scenario.secondary: supporting actions are needed alongside the primary
usage_scenario.destructive: the action may result in data loss or is irreversible
usage_scenario.default: the specific component logic is required

anti_pattern.button: using multiple primary buttons in the same view
anti_pattern.input: omitting a clear label for the field
anti_pattern.card: nesting cards inside cards or overloading with too many actions
anti_pattern.default: using this component for unrelated UI patterns

variant_specific_template.template: This variant represents the {variant_name} state. Use it specifically for {specific_context}.

specific_context.Disabled: non-interactive states where the action is unavailable
specific_context.Hover: the interactive feedback when cursor enters the component
specific_context.Pressed: the momentary pressed feedback during click/tap
specific_context.Focus: keyboard navigation and accessibility focus rings

namingConventions._comment: These conventions are enforced by ds-naming-validator.ts at scan time

modes.requirement: Every token must belong to at least one Mode for automatic theming
